hero.desc: Experience Minecraft like never before. Join our community of 85,000+ players across multiple game modes with zero lag and maximum fun.

gamemodes.title: Game Modes
gamemodes.desc: Choose your adventure. From classic survival to competitive mini-games, we have it all.

items.name: Survival
items.desc: Classic survival experience with economy, land claims, and quests.

items.name: Creative
items.desc: Unlimited resources and flight. Build your dream creations.

items.name: SkyBlock
items.desc: Start on a floating island and build your sky empire.

items.name: Mini-Games
items.desc: BedWars, SkyWars, Parkour and more exciting game modes.

rules.title: Server Rules
rules.desc: Follow these rules to ensure a great experience for everyone.
items: No hacking, cheating, or exploiting bugs
Be respectful to all players and staff
Keep chat in English or use /msg for private

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Adventure?
cta.desc: Join thousands of players already exploring, building, and competing on Aeracraft.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Everything you need to know about playing on Aeracraft.

join.step1_1: Download and install Minecraft Java Edition from minecraft.net
join.step1_2: Make sure you have a valid Minecraft account
join.step1_3: Launch the game and select the latest release version
join.step1_tip: We recommend using the official launcher. Third-party launchers may have compatibility issues.
join.step2_2: Click 'Add Server' and enter the server address
join.step2_3: Click 'Done' and select the server to join
join.step3_item1: Choose a game mode from the server selector
join.step3_item2: Read the rules with /rules in chat
join.step3_item4: Ask staff for help if you need anything!

gamemodes.survival_desc: Classic survival gameplay with an active economy, land protection via Residence plugin, and quest system. Earn money by trading, completing quests, and mining.
gamemodes.smp_desc: A shared survival world where you can build, explore, and collaborate with other players. Perfect for those who enjoy a community-driven survival experience.
gamemodes.residence_desc: Residence is our land protection plugin. It allows you to claim a area of land and protect it from other players. No extra mods needed — just use in-game commands.
gamemodes.residence_cmd2: — Select an area with a wooden axe
gamemodes.residence_cmd3: — Set the owner of a residence area

items.q: What version of Minecraft do I need?
items.a: We support the latest stable release of Minecraft Java Edition. Check our Discord for version-specific announcements.

items.q: Do I need to install any mods?
items.a: No mods required! Our server uses server-side plugins only. Just connect with a vanilla Minecraft client.

items.q: How do I protect my build?
items.a: Use the Residence plugin to claim land. Type /res select with a wooden axe to select corners, then /res create [name] to claim.
You can earn money by selling items, completing quests, mining, or trading with other players. Use /bal to check your balance.

items.q: I was griefed! What do I do?
items.a: Contact a staff member immediately with evidence (screenshots). We take griefing very seriously and will help restore your build.

items.q: Can I play with friends on different accounts?
items.a: Yes! As long as each player has a legitimate Minecraft Java Edition account, they can join and play together.

items.q: How do I report a bug or cheater?
items.a: Use /report [player] [reason] in-game, or create a ticket on our Discord server with as much detail as possible.
Yes, we have a rank system with perks. Check our Discord store for available ranks and benefits.

changes.text: Added new SkyBlock challenges and rewards
New Residence flags for finer land control
Fixed economy balance display on join
Improved server performance with optimized chunk loading
Updated anti-cheat to reduce false positives
Economy system with shops and trading

tools.title: Tools
tools.desc: Useful tools for Minecraft players and server administrators.

chat.title: Chat Text Formatter
chat.desc: Create formatted chat messages with color codes. Use & followed by a color code (0-f) or format code (l, n, o, etc.).

coords.title: Coordinate Converter
coords.desc: Convert coordinates between Overworld and Nether. The Nether is 8x smaller than the Overworld.
coords.tip: In Minecraft, 1 block in the Nether = 8 blocks in the Overworld. Always build Nether portals at matching coordinates!

commands.title: Server Commands Reference
commands.desc: Common commands available on Aeracraft. Click any command to copy it.
commands.tip: Commands are not case-sensitive. You can also use tab completion by pressing Tab after typing part of a command.

residence.title: Residence Plugin Guide
residence.desc: Residence is a land protection plugin. Claim your land, set permissions, and protect your builds — no mods needed.
residence.what_p1: Residence lets you claim a rectangular area of land and control who can do what inside it. It's the primary way to protect your builds on Aeracraft.
residence.what_f2: Control build, use, pvp, and more per area
residence.what_f3: Add trusted players to your residence
residence.what_f4: No client mods required — all server-side
residence.create_s1: Select the area with a wooden axe
residence.create_s2: Left-click one corner, right-click the opposite corner
residence.create_s2_desc: This creates a selection. You'll see a confirmation message in chat.
residence.manage_add: Add a player to your residence
residence.manage_remove: Remove a player from your residence
residence.flags_desc: Flags control what players can do in a residence. Set them with /res set [residence] [flag] [true|false]
residence.flag_example: Example: Disable PvP in your residence:
residence.tip1: Your first residence is free! Additional residences may cost in-game money.
residence.tip2: Use a golden shovel for faster selection — it works like the wooden axe but is faster.
residence.tip3: You can create sub-areas within your residence for different permission levels.
residence.tip4: Check /res info to see all flags and players in a residence.
residence.tip5: Residences cannot overlap with other players' claims.
